name: Cod in Spicy Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Cornstarch mixed with 2 tbsp Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cod by cutting it diagonally into 4 pieces.
2. Beat the egg white and mix in cornstarch until evenly blended.
3. Dip the fish in the egg mixture, then coat with cornstarch.
4. Fry the fish lightly in oil at 300°F.
5. Finely chop garlic and leek.
6. Cut chives into 1-inch lengths.
7. Remove excess moisture from bean curd by wrapping it in clean, dry cloth.
8. Heat peanut oil in a wok.
9. Stir-fry meat until well cooked.
10. Add soy sauce and stir.
11. Pour in heated stock.
12. Add fried cod followed by rice wine and remaining soy sauce.
13. Cook for 5-6 minutes.
14. Add bean curd, cook for 3-4 minutes.
15. Stir in cornstarch mixture to thicken (avoid mixing too vigorously).
16. Add chili powder, chives, and a few drops of sesame oil.
